system.name: Eden Skye Studios
system.created_context: Repo and Drive folder are new, started approximately 2026-06-02.
system.primary_objective: Provide GPT, Higgins, HeyGen, and Auto Builder with governed avatar stock images, persona data, manifests, indexes, and automation rules for image and video generation.

brand_repo.name: Strategic-Minds/EDENSKYESTUDIOS
brand_repo.role: Brand app, media control surface, avatar manifest source, launch workflow, Supabase/Vercel operating routes.

auto_builder_repo.name: Strategic-Minds/AUTO_BUILDER
auto_builder_repo.role: Orchestration, governed factory control plane, cross-system build and validation source.

legacy_or_secondary_repo.name: Strategic-Minds/EDEN_SKYE
legacy_or_secondary_repo.role: Older/simple Eden Skye repo discovered during validation. Not modified in this bootstrap pass.

gpt.role: Read manifests, choose avatar/persona, draft prompts/scripts, enforce approval gates, log receipts.

higgins.role: Automation/operator layer named by Jeremy. Must use this manifest, avatar stock index, and approval matrix before image/video actions.

heygen.role: Avatar/video execution layer after approved source image selection, avatar creation/training, consent, and look validation.

auto_builder.role: Factory control plane and sync authority for build packets, validation receipts, sandbox promotion, and guarded automation.

governance.fictional_identity_boundary: Eden Skye is a fictional adult AI luxury creator brand, not a real person.
governance.media_safety: Tasteful, luxury, cinematic, platform-safe, non-explicit imagery only.
